identity.personality: Warm, mystical, knowing — like a wise friend who sees beyond the surface
identity.signature_item: Jade teardrop pendant necklace (MUST appear in EVERY image)

face.eyes: Warm brown, gentle, slightly upturned — NOT blue, NOT grey
face.skin: Fair luminous K-beauty glass skin, light porcelain-warm tone, minimal visible pores
face.expression: Calm knowing smile, warm eyes — 'I know something you don't'

hair.color: Dark brown, almost black — if lighter, REGENERATE
hair.description_allcaps: DARK BROWN ALMOST-BLACK LONG HAIR PAST SHOULDERS WITH SOFT CURTAIN BANGS SLIGHTLY WAVY — NOT SHORT NOT BOB NOT BLONDE

fashion.jewelry: Only jade pendant + small gold hoops + stacked thin gold bangles

photography.style: iPhone/mirrorless candid — like a real person's Instagram. NEVER editorial, NEVER studio, NEVER cinematic CG
photography.lighting: Natural window light, golden hour, candlelight — NO flash, NO studio strobe
photography.background_rules: Western city (NYC/LA/Melbourne) OR warm home apartment with plants/books/candles. NEVER temple, NEVER zen garden
photography.mood: Intimate, warm, approachable — friend's Instagram aesthetic

voice.description: Warm, slightly husky, measured pace, mystical but not breathy. Slight East Asian lilt

environments.name: home_living
environments.description: Warm apartment living room, plants, books, candles, soft throw blankets

environments.name: home_bedroom
environments.description: Cozy bedroom, morning light through sheer curtains

environments.name: cafe
environments.description: Quiet café corner, exposed brick, warm wood

environments.name: outdoor_city
environments.description: City street walk, autumn/spring, golden hour

environments.name: oracle_reading
environments.description: Intimate reading setup — dark background, candles, cards spread
environments.lighting: Candlelight + single warm key, dark ambient

anti_drift: EXACT SAME WOMAN from reference images — do NOT generate a different woman
Her face, bone structure, eyes, nose, jawline, smile, and hair MUST be identical to refs
Jade teardrop pendant necklace MUST be visible
No illustration, no cartoon, no CG, no anime, no watercolor
Photorealistic only — iPhone quality, NOT editorial, NOT studio
rules.prompt_suffix: Photorealistic iPhone candid quality. DARK BROWN ALMOST-BLACK LONG HAIR PAST SHOULDERS WITH SOFT CURTAIN BANGS. Jade teardrop pendant necklace visible. No illustration, no cartoon, no CG.
